 Chief of Staff GBR GOV [
] (FCDO) <
> 
Subject: RE: 
 - HMA-Designate Washington - C meeting
Classification: UK SECRET UK EYES ONLY 
Hi 
, 
Thanks for this and apologies for my delay in responding. 
Peter is very much looking forward to his visit on 
. This is a priority for him and he’ll 
value those wider briefings. His next commitment on 
 is a 1pm lunch in central London – 
so he should be able to stay with you until 1230.  
I think you’re aware that he has just met DG Q (at C’s encouragement), which he found very 
helpful.  
I should also mention, for transparency, that HMA-des is yet to receive his DV clearance. 
Given the short time frame until his posting, and the fact he is a Privy Counsellor, seniors 
here are giving him access to higher classification material on a case-by-case basis. I just 
wanted to ensure C and your other seniors are aware, but it is of course for them to judge 
what is appropriate, given this rather unique case.   
Kind regards, 
   
From: 
  
Sent: 08 January 2025 19:48

C is looking forward to hosting Lord Mandelson at our HQs after the Atlantic Partnership 
breakfast on 
.  In addition to having a meeting with C we would like to arrange wider
